scenes.sceneDesc: Present. Storybrooke. The Sheriff's station. David Nolan is sitting in Emma's office. Emma enters and hands him a mug of tea.

dialog.dialog: Thank you. I hope Kathryn is somewhere warm, not out in the cold.
David. I think you need to start worrying about yourself a little bit more here. Your wife is missing, you're in love with another woman. There's this  unexplained phone call.
I know. I know. I just-  -I can't explain why it says that. I didn't do anything to my wife.
I'm pretty good at spotting a liar. And honestly, liars have better material. Now, go home.
I can go?
We don't even know if there was a crime yet. So, get some sleep.
Thank you.
And David? Maybe,  get a lawyer.

scenes.sceneDesc: Storybrooke. Present. Granny's Diner. Ruby is talking to August standing beside his table.

dialog.dialog: You can't be serious. A whole year without a roof on your head.
I get used to it. Plus I had the motorcycle so, if I didn't like a place after a while…
Ruby!
I've never even been out of Storybrooke. What was your favorite place?
Nepal. Best people. They have these prayer temples carved into mountains that are overrun with lemurs.
What's a lemur?
Ruby!
Just give ma a sec!
They're little animals. Mhm. And they have these eyes that reflect light. So, at night it looks like they glow.
Ruby! Stop flirting and get over here!

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Who's there?
Let me in.
I'm just a poor, old widow. Spare me!
Let me in, or I'll…
Yes?
I'll huff and I'll puff and I'll blow the-
You'll huff and puff?
I couldn't think of nothing.
Oh, so you thought that you'd level the house with the power of your breath?  Well, a case could be made…
Oh, ho ho ho-
Shh! Granny's in the other room. You know she doesn't like me opening the shutters.
No, she doesn't like me.
That's what I meant.
You got to get out of here.
I know. Anywhere.
Well, a blacksmith's boy can get work all over.
You'd leave everyone you know? You'd do that for me?
I'd do anything for you.
Peter, watch out. Your air of danger is slipping.
Come out– just, for a minute.
It's already dark. She'd never let me.
Red! Where are you? What are you doing?
Let go.
Pay the price. One kiss.
Red, get in here!
What's going on?
Nothing that concerns you. Just a bunch of fools trying to get themselves killed over a few dead sheep.
Wolf took out a dozen last night.
So, you called me in here to what? Just to keep me in sight?
Good evening, Red. We’re just forming up a hunting party.
You're hunting the wolf? Can I go with them, please? I'll be safe in a big group.
Don't be ludicrous. You are staying inside and you're keeping that hood on. You know red repels wolves.
They're not wearing red.
They're damn fools, too. There's only two more nights left in Wolfstime– let it take a few sheep. Now, go home.
I hope they kill the wolf. Then we can have lives again.
You just want to roam around the woods with that wastrel– Peter.
He's not a wastrel. He works hard. He has plans.
Oh, I am sure he does. Now, come on. You know what to do.  Now, go to sleep, girl.
Yes, Granny.
I hope I don't see that boy mooning around here tomorrow. And wear the hood.
Yes, Granny.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Scene: Present. Storybrooke. Granny's Diner. Ruby finally goes to meet Granny at the counter.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I can't believe you did that. That was humiliating.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I want you to start working Saturday nights.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Come on, we have an agreement about Saturday night.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I want to start training you to do the books and the reorders. Business is booming lately, and with more money comes more paperwork.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Yeah, none of that sounds good.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: It's got to be done.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Is this punishment for talking to that guy?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: If I wanted to punish you, I'd have better reasons. For one thing, you were late. For another thing, Liza, you dress like a drag queen during Fleet Week.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: And you dress like Norman Bates when he dresses like Norman Bates' mother.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Ruby, you're a grown woman, you need to stop acting like some kid.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: You just want me to act like you until I turn into you. Well, I am not a fossil yet, Granny. I should be out there having adventures with lemurs!

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Well, as long as you work here, you are going to listen to me.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I didn't ask to work here.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Well, then what's keeping ya?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Nothing! I quit!

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Scene: Present. The Enchanted Forest. Red walks out of her room and finds Granny still guarding the front door.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Did you get any sleep last night?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I'll sleep with the trolls in the afterlife. I'll get the shutters, you go check if that wolf left the chickens alone.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Yes, Granny.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Wear the hood!

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Outside of Granny and Red's cottage. Red is in the chicken coop, collecting the eggs. When she goes to leave, she hears a noise coming from a nearby corner. Holding two eggs, Snow White shows herself.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: : I'm sorry. I can go,

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Are you... stealing our eggs?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: No... not a lot.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Hey, hey, it's... it's all right.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Thank you. It's just that, um, last night... there was something out there. There was howling... and I heard it. And it was so cold, so...

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Hey. Come on, come with me. Everyone calls me Red.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I'm Sn-Frosty.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: (amused) Frosty? Really?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: No. It's just that someone is looking for me, so...

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: You don't know or trust me yet. Hey, I-I get it, I just need something to call you.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Uh, Margaret. Oh, no, uh, Mary.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Mary. Well then, Mary, come on. (Snow White follows Red out of the chicken coop and into the forest. They head towards a well.)  I just got to bring in some water before we go in. It'll just take a second.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: What was all that howling?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: It's Wolfstime. Killer wolf out there. As big as a pony but a lot more blood thirsty. It's been stalking the forest pretty regular. It kills cattle and... hold on. (Red grabs the rope of the bucket in the well) It sticks sometimes. Could you just...?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.
Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Look, look at that, Mary look at the water. (The water in the bucket is red.) Mary. Mary. Mary?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.
Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Scene: Present. Storybrooke. Mary Margaret runs to catch up to Emma in the street. Then then two walk together.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Is he ok? David?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Oh, yeah, he's a little shaken up, but he's headed home. He's fine.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Any word from Kathryn?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Nothing new.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Did you check with Boston again?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: She's not there, Mary Margaret.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: So, we have no idea what happened to her?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: All we know is that she found out about you, gave you a well-deserved slap, and then disappeared.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Well-deserved? So you really believe that?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: No. I just preparing you for what everyone else is going to think. You two are going to look bad until we figure the truth out.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: You mean, David? Th-that people are going to think in order to... be free with me...

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Some are, and he's not doing himself any favors. So if there's anything you could think of to pin his whereabouts that night—

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: He wasn't with me. We really are through

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.
Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Sorry, no, I don't need a ride.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: It's awfully cold out here.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Im fine, really.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I can carry your bag. Where are you headed?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Dr. Whale?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Mary Margaret, Emma. Hello there.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Hey.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I was just having a talk wit Ruby here. But I should um...

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Yeah. Yeah you should.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Yeah... (he leaves)

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Was he bothering you?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: The day I can't handle a leech is the day I leave town... which this is, I guess.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: You're leaving?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I had a fight with Granny. Quit my job.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: You quit? Where you going?

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: I don't know. Away.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Yeah, well, buses out of town don't really happen. And you might want a destination first.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Hey, if you need a place to figure things out, you could always come home with us.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Uh, yeah. Yeah. Just for a little while.

scenes.sceneDesc: Past. Enchanted Forest. A man is seen knocking on a window. A voice answers from inside.

dialog.dialog: Come on.
